violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Establishment placed a service call during time of inspection to have ice machine professionally cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The tile floor in the kitchen has areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2026
The blade on the deli slicer not in good repair. All food equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
